CustomField.description: Widget targeting filter: St. Thomas Connection type (e.g. Faculty/Staff, Parent, Donor, Alumni). Leave blank to show to all connection types. When populated, only contacts whose St_Thomas_Connection__c field contains one of the selected values will see this widget. Replaces the old Faculty_Staff, Parent, and Donor Audience_Rule__c values. References the St_Thomas_Connection global picklist. Source: 2026_PortalUpdates-Widget_Filters.csv
CustomField.label: Filter: St. Thomas Connection
